zh.lifeSummary: 當Cadwgan ap Bleddyn於1051年出生在威爾士梅利奧爾南瑙 霍爾時，他的父親Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys26歲，母親Haer Verch Cyllyn27歲。他於1075年與Ewron Verch Hoedlyw在威爾士結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1088年登記服兵役。他去世於1111年在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾維爾申普爾享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Cadwgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from Old Welsh cad ‘battle’ + gwogawn ‘glory, distinction’, or ‘honour’; the name of several Welsh princes in the early Middle Ages and of two characters mentioned in the Mabinogi.

variants.name: Cadogan
meanings: Anglicized form of   Cadwgan .  It was revived in the 19th century, perhaps in part as a transferred use of the surname.

variants.name: Cadwgawn
meanings: Traditional: from Old Welsh cad ‘battle’ + gwogawn ‘glory, distinction’, or ‘honour’; the name of several Welsh princes in the early Middle Ages and of two characters mentioned in the Mabinogi.

en.lifeSummary: When Cadwgan ap Bleddyn was born in 1051, in Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Wales, his father, Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys, was 26 and his mother, Haer Verch Cyllyn, was 27. He married Ewron Verch Hoedlyw in 1075, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He registered for military service in 1088. He died in 1111, in Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Wales, at the age of 60.

fr.Nannau, Merionethshire, Wales: Nannau, Merionethshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cadwgan ap Bleddyn est né en 1051, à Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Galles, son père, Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Haer Verch Cyllyn, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Ewron Verch Hoedlyw en 1075, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1088. Il est décédé en 1111, à Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Galles, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cadwgan ap Bleddyn 1051 in Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys 26 und seine Mutter Haer Verch Cyllyn 27. Er hat 1075 in Wales Ewron Verch Hoedlyw geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er hat sich 1088 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1111 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cadwgan ap Bleddyn è nato il nel 1051 nel Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Galles, il suo padre, Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Haer Verch Cyllyn, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Ewron Verch Hoedlyw nel 1075, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1088. Morì nel 1111, nel Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Galles, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cadwgan ap Bleddynが1051年にウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアナナウ ハルで生まれた時，父Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powysは26歳，母Haer Verch Cyllynは27歳であった。1075年にウェールズでEwron Verch Hoedlywと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1088年に兵役登録をした。彼は1111年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアウエルシュプオオルで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cadwgan ap Bleddyn(이)가 1051년 웨일스 머이오네스실르 나나 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Haer Verch Cyllyn(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1075년 웨일스에서 Ewron Verch Hoedlyw(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1088년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1111년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 웰쉬포에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cadwgan ap Bleddyn nasceu em 1051, em Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Gales, seu pai, Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Haer Verch Cyllyn, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Ewron Verch Hoedlyw em 1075, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1088. Ele faleceu em 1111, em Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Gales, com 60 anos.

ro.Nannau, Merionethshire, Wales: Nannau, Merionethshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cadwgan ap Bleddyn родился в 1051 г. в местности наннау холл, мириоунетшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Haer Verch Cyllyn, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Ewron Verch Hoedlyw в 1075 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. В 1088 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1111 г. в местности велшпул, монтгомиришир, Уэльс в возрасте 60 лет.

sm.From 1075 to 1111: mai le 1075 e o'o I le 1111

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cadwgan ap Bleddyn nació en 1051, en Nannau Hall, Merionethshire, Gales, su papá, Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Haer Verch Cyllyn, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Ewron Verch Hoedlyw en 1075, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1088. Murió en 1111, en Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Gales, a la edad de 60 años.
